FR-01.title: Account Opening
requirements: Online application for savings and checking accounts
Initial deposit via card or transfer
acceptance_criteria: Application submitted with all required documents
Account number is issued and communicated

FR-02.title: Fund Transfer
requirements: Transfer to other bank accounts via routing number
acceptance_criteria: External transfers initiate within business hours
Scheduled transfers execute on set date

FR-03.title: Bill Payment
requirements: Save frequent billers for quick access
acceptance_criteria: Bill is paid and balance deducted
Saved billers appear in quick pay

FR-04.title: Transaction History
requirements: View all transactions with date, amount, and type
Filter by date range, type, and amount
Export statement as PDF or CSV

FR-05.title: Two-Factor Authentication
requirements: OTP via SMS or authenticator app for login
OTP required for fund transfers above threshold
acceptance_criteria: OTP is required and validated on login
Biometric auth works on supported devices

FR-06.title: Card Management
requirements: View linked debit and credit cards
Set spending limits per transaction and daily
acceptance_criteria: Spending limit blocks transactions above amount

FR-07.title: Loan Application
requirements: Apply for personal loan with amount and tenure
System calculates EMI based on interest rate
acceptance_criteria: Application is submitted with required documents
Documents are verified by loan officer

FR-08.title: Account Alerts and Notifications
requirements: Balance alerts for low balance threshold
Transaction alerts for debits above set amount
acceptance_criteria: Low balance alert triggers at threshold
Large debit alert is sent immediately

FR-09.title: Budget and Spending Analytics
requirements: Budget setting per category with alerts

FR-10.title: Customer Support
acceptance_criteria: Call back is received within 1 hour
Complaint has reference number and status tracking

FR-01.title: Build Account Application API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/accounts/apply (type, personal details, KYC documents). Validate required fields. Store documents securely. Queue for KYC verification. Generate account number on approval.

FR-01.title: Build Account Opening UI
FR-01.description: Create multi-step application: Step 1 account type selection, Step 2 personal details form, Step 3 KYC document upload (ID, proof of address), Step 4 initial deposit. Application status tracker.

FR-01.title: Create Accounts Database Schema
FR-01.description: Design accounts table: id, account_number, user_id, type (savings/checking), balance, status (pending/active/frozen), opened_at. kyc_documents table: user_id, type, file_url, status, verified_at.

FR-02.title: Build Transfer API
FR-02.description: Create POST /api/transfers (from_account, to_account, amount, type). Internal transfers: instant. External: via ACH with routing number. POST /api/transfers/schedule for future and recurring. Enforce daily limits.

FR-02.title: Build Transfer UI
FR-02.description: Create transfer page with source account dropdown, destination (own account or external with routing/account number), amount input, schedule options (now/future/recurring), and confirmation screen with OTP.

FR-02.title: Write Transfer Tests
FR-02.description: Test internal transfer deducts and credits instantly. Test external transfer creates pending record. Test insufficient balance is rejected. Test scheduled transfer executes on date. Test daily limit enforcement.

FR-03.title: Build Bill Payment API
FR-03.description: Create POST /api/bills/pay (biller_id, amount, account_id). POST /api/billers (save frequent biller). POST /api/bills/schedule (recurring). Generate payment receipt. Deduct from account.

FR-03.title: Build Bill Payment UI
FR-03.description: Create bill pay page with biller search/selection, saved billers quick access, amount input, account selector, and schedule options. Payment confirmation with receipt download.

FR-04.title: Build Transaction History API
FR-04.description: Create GET /api/accounts/:id/transactions with pagination, filters (date_from, date_to, type, min_amount, max_amount), and search. GET /api/accounts/:id/statement for PDF/CSV export.

FR-04.title: Build Transaction History UI
FR-04.description: Create transaction list with date, description, amount (green credit/red debit), and running balance. Filter panel with date picker, type dropdown, amount range. Search bar. Export button.

FR-05.title: Build 2FA System
FR-05.description: Implement OTP generation (6-digit, 5-min expiry) via SMS. Support TOTP authenticator apps. Biometric auth via device API. Generate 10 recovery codes on setup. Enforce 2FA on login and high-value transfers.

FR-05.title: Build 2FA Setup and Verification UI
FR-05.description: Create 2FA setup flow with method selection (SMS/Authenticator/Biometric). QR code for authenticator setup. Recovery codes display with download option. OTP input screen for verification.

FR-06.title: Build Card Management API
FR-06.description: Create GET /api/cards (linked cards). POST /api/cards/:id/freeze, /api/cards/:id/unfreeze. PATCH /api/cards/:id/limits (per_transaction, daily). POST /api/cards/:id/report-lost.

FR-06.title: Build Card Management UI
FR-06.description: Create cards page with card display (masked number, type, status). Toggle switch for freeze/unfreeze. Limits input fields. Report Lost button with confirmation and replacement tracking.

FR-07.title: Build Loan Application API
FR-07.description: Create POST /api/loans/apply (amount, tenure, purpose). Calculate EMI using standard formula. Document upload for income proof. Track status (submitted/reviewing/approved/disbursed/rejected).

FR-07.title: Build Loan Application UI
FR-07.description: Create loan application with amount slider, tenure selector, EMI calculator preview, income document upload, and submit. Status tracker showing application progress.

FR-08.title: Build Alert System
FR-08.description: Create notification service with alert types: low_balance, large_debit, unrecognized_login. Store alert preferences per user. Send via push, SMS, and email based on preference.

FR-08.title: Build Alert Preferences UI
FR-08.description: Create alert settings page with toggles for each alert type, threshold inputs for balance and debit amounts, channel selection (push/SMS/email), and test alert button.

FR-09.title: Build Analytics API
FR-09.description: Create GET /api/analytics/spending (monthly category breakdown). Auto-categorize transactions. POST /api/budgets (set per category). GET /api/analytics/trends (historical monthly totals).

FR-09.title: Build Spending Analytics Dashboard
FR-09.description: Create analytics page with spending pie chart by category, monthly bar chart comparison, budget progress bars per category with alerts on overspend, and trend line chart.

FR-10.title: Build Support System API
FR-10.description: Create WebSocket chat endpoint for live support. POST /api/support/callback (request call back). GET /api/support/faq (searchable articles). POST /api/support/complaints (with tracking number).

FR-10.title: Build Support Center UI
FR-10.description: Create support hub with live chat widget, callback request form with preferred time, searchable FAQ section, and complaint form with reference number tracking.
